name: Water quality
description: Water-quality probes reporting at least one of pH, turbidity, residual chlorine, dissolved oxygen, or ORP.
notes: water.ph (0-14), water.turbidity (NTU), water.residualChlorine (mg/L), water.dissolvedOxygen (mg/L), water.orp (mV). Reuses water.temperature.current and water.ec.
